screenshots.title: Ontahi system architecture reading flow
screenshots.notes: Animated BookOps reading flow for the Ontahi systems and architecture essay.

screenshots.title: Ontahi Library / System Architecture - light
screenshots.notes: Living Systems book in BookOps with botanical/organic visual language.

screenshots.title: Ontahi Library / System Architecture - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode chapter cover with tree-ring imagery and nested chapter navigation.

screenshots.title: Psicoanalisis Freud - primer parcial material - light
screenshots.notes: BookOps reader showing an integrated timeline diagram for the first Freud material.

screenshots.title: Psicoanalisis Freud - primer parcial material - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode BookOps reader showing Mermaid-like conceptual diagrams and deep navigation.

screenshots.title: BookOps reading flow
screenshots.notes: Animated reading flow showing BookOps as a live reader rather than a static publishing surface.

screenshots.title: BookOps conversations flow
screenshots.notes: Animated walkthrough of inline conversations, annotations and reactions inside the reading experience.

screenshots.title: BookOps slide mode flow
screenshots.notes: Animated slide mode showing a book section transformed into a navigable presentation.

screenshots.title: BookOps LaTeX Playground
screenshots.notes: Storybook playground showing reusable BookOps components and a side-by-side LaTeX to BookOps AST to BookOps reader pipeline.

screenshots.title: BookOps landing - dark
screenshots.notes: BookOps author workspace with GitHub book onboarding and visible book cards.

screenshots.title: BookOps landing - light
screenshots.notes: Light-mode BookOps author workspace.

screenshots.title: BookOps reader with Emotia - light
screenshots.notes: BookOps reading experience applied to Emotia, showing table of contents, centered text, audio controls and margin illustration.

screenshots.title: BookOps conversation with reactions - light
screenshots.notes: Inline conversation anchored to highlighted text, with reaction count and resolve flow inside the reader.

screenshots.title: BookOps reaction autocomplete - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode inline discussion composer with emoji/reaction autocomplete over selected text.

screenshots.title: Ontahi Graph Entity Browser - light
screenshots.notes: Reflective Entity Browser showing schema metadata, operations and persisted Book rows.

screenshots.title: Ontahi Graph Entity Browser - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode reflective Entity Browser.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode semantic map with graph canvas, item counts and detail inspector.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - light
screenshots.notes: Light-mode semantic map with Atlas Model selected.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - item evolution - light
screenshots.notes: Item detail modal showing the Evolution tab with past, now, next and later relationships.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - item evolution - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode Evolution tab with temporal columns over the semantic map backdrop.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - plan detail - light
screenshots.notes: Plan detail modal showing overview content, implementation goals and code-oriented constraints.

screenshots.title: Workstream Atlas - plan detail - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode plan detail modal with source-like planning content and implementation goals.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - light
screenshots.notes: Calendar decision surface with selected subjects, vacancies, venues and saved choices.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode calendar showing dense course offer, vacancy indicators and filters.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - analytics overview
screenshots.notes: Vacancy analytics overview with capture windows, status counters and time-series charts.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - vacancies by subject
screenshots.notes: Analytics table ranking vacancy availability by subject, with trends and capture history.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - vacancy drops
screenshots.notes: Drop analysis view showing temporal snapshots and top vacancy losses.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - subject offer blocks
screenshots.notes: Subject offer view showing available commissions and associated practical/theoretical blocks in the calendar.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - selected commission blocks
screenshots.notes: Selected commission state highlighting the chosen block and its related course blocks among the broader offer.

screenshots.title: UBA Psi Scheduler - interactive tour
screenshots.notes: Interactive guided tour explaining the first decision step and pointing at the subject selector.

screenshots.title: Shiki Lang Wollok - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode Wollok syntax highlighting specimen rendered through the Shiki language package.

screenshots.title: Shiki Lang Wollok - light
screenshots.notes: Light-mode Wollok snippet showing object, var, method and return highlighting.

screenshots.title: Freud Reading Board flow
screenshots.notes: Animated walkthrough of the reading board for Freud's second partial, showing progress tracking, modules, guide material and reading cards.

screenshots.title: Psicoanalisis Freud reading board - second partial - dark
screenshots.notes: Kanban-style reading board with progress, modules, guide tabs, repeated/read filters and reading cards.

screenshots.title: Freud Reading Board - programa y guias - dark
screenshots.notes: Program and guide section connecting module topics, catedra notes and linked readings.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ practice - dark
screenshots.notes: Exam simulator with local question bank, progress counters, answer selection and evaluation controls.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ practice - light
screenshots.notes: Light-mode exam practice interface.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ question bank - light
screenshots.notes: Question-bank administration view with 303 questions, 31 topics, 16 sources and latest load metadata.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ question bank - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode question-bank view with searchable visualization table.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ JSON source - dark
screenshots.notes: Structured JSON question-bank example with generated distractors, source metadata, options and answer key.

screenshots.title: Neurofisiologia MCQ saved sessions - dark
screenshots.notes: Saved practice history stored locally, with timestamps, modes, scores and export actions.

screenshots.title: Ontahí: Book of Styles reading flow
screenshots.notes: Animated BookOps reading flow for the Ontahi style specification, showing the custom botanical experience in motion.

screenshots.notes: Dark-mode BookOps reader page for The Ontahi Language Kit, showing the Ceibo symbol specimen and botanical design language.

screenshots.title: Ontahí: Book of Styles - light
screenshots.notes: Light-mode Ontahi style specification rendered with its own botanical visual system.

screenshots.title: The Mechanics of Thoughts original PDF - light
screenshots.notes: Original LaTeX/PDF rendering of the same chess-move section, showing the source book preserved and expanded in BookOps.

screenshots.notes: The Mechanics of Thoughts rendered in BookOps with code blocks, a chess example and margin feedback.

screenshots.title: The Mechanics of Thoughts - dark
screenshots.notes: Dark-mode The Mechanics of Thoughts page showing the reader, code presentation and annotation margin.
